title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.385 - Michael Collins Day, October 16
text:
9.385.  Michael Collins Day, October 16. — October sixteenth of each year shall be known and designated as "Michael Collins Day" in Missouri in honor of Michael Collins, an Irish revolutionary, soldier, and politician who was a leading figure in the struggle for Irish independence.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
